phrases.zh: 感受停在我发端的指尖
phrases.literal_en: Feel the fingertips resting at the ends of my hair
phrases.text: Feel the fingertips resting at the ends of my hair

phrases.zh: 如何瞬间冻结时间
phrases.literal_en: How to instantly freeze time
phrases.text: How to instantly freeze time

phrases.zh: 记住望着我坚定的双眼
phrases.literal_en: Remember the determined eyes gazing at me
phrases.text: Remember determined eyes gazing at me

phrases.zh: 也许已经没有明天
phrases.literal_en: Perhaps there is no tomorrow left
phrases.text: Perhaps there's no tomorrow left

phrases.zh: 面对浩瀚的星海我们微小得像尘埃
phrases.literal_en: Facing the vast sea of stars, we are as tiny as dust
phrases.text: Facing the vast sea of stars we're as tiny as dust

phrases.zh: 漂浮在一片无奈
phrases.literal_en: Floating in a sea of helplessness
phrases.text: Floating in a sea of helplessness

phrases.zh: 缘份让我们相遇乱世以外
phrases.literal_en: Fate brought us together outside the chaotic world
phrases.text: Fate brought us together outside the chaotic world

phrases.zh: 命运却要我们危难中相爱
phrases.literal_en: Yet destiny demands we fall in love amidst peril
phrases.text: we fall in love amidst peril

phrases.zh: 也许未来遥远在光年之外
phrases.literal_en: Perhaps the future lies far beyond light-years away
phrases.text: Perhaps the future lies far beyond light years away

phrases.zh: 我愿守候未知里为你等待
phrases.literal_en: I am willing to wait for you in the unknown
phrases.text: willing to wait for you in unknown

phrases.zh: 我没想到为了你我能疯狂到山崩海啸
phrases.literal_en: I never expected I could go so mad for you that mountains would collapse and tsunamis would rise
phrases.text: I never expected I go so mad for you mountains

phrases.zh: 没有你根本不想逃我的大脑
phrases.literal_en: Without you, my mind simply refuses to flee
phrases.text: Without you my mind refuses to flee

phrases.zh: 为了你已经疯狂到脉搏心跳没有你
phrases.literal_en: For you, I have gone so crazy that without you, my pulse and heartbeat
phrases.text: For you I've gone so crazy that without you my pulse and heartbeat

phrases.zh: 根本不重要
phrases.literal_en: simply do not matter at all
phrases.text: simply don't matter at all

phrases.zh: 一双围在我胸口的臂弯
phrases.literal_en: A pair of arms wrapped around my chest
phrases.text: pair of arms wrapped around my chest

phrases.zh: 足够抵挡天旋地转
phrases.literal_en: is enough to withstand the dizzying spin
phrases.text: is enough to withstand dizzying spin

phrases.zh: 一种执迷不放手的倔强足以
phrases.literal_en: A stubborn obsession of refusing to let go is enough to
phrases.text: stubborn obsession of refusing to let go enough

phrases.zh: 点燃所有希望
phrases.literal_en: ignite all hope
phrases.text: ignite all hope

phrases.zh: 宇宙磅礡而冷漠我们的爱微小却闪烁
phrases.literal_en: The universe is vast and indifferent, our love is tiny yet shimmering
phrases.text: universe vast indifferent our love tiny yet shimmering

phrases.zh: 颠簸却如此忘我
